question: What is the base-10 logarithm of the atomic oxygen erosion yield of the polymer Polyamide 66 [Nylon 66] represented by SMILES [*]CCCCC(=O)NCCCCCCNC([*])=O, with no coating, composed of 7 stacked thin-film layers, oriented in the ram direction for a mission time of 4.0 years, subjected to a solar exposure of 6300 equivalent sun hours and an atomic oxygen fluence of 8.430e+21 atom/cm^2?
